name: Fresh Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs in a large bowl.
2. Gradually add sugar, vegetable oil, and vanilla to the eggs, mixing well.
3. Stir in the self-rising flour until just combined.
4. Fold in the chopped apples and pecans.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour in a preheated oven.
7. Turn off the heat and let cool before serving.
